basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification Out, 86 Vacancies, Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: The official AIIMS Rajkot Faculty notification gives a complete picture of the recruitment timeline from application to selection.

age_limit.details: Post Upper Age Limit Professor Not exceeding 58 years as on closing date Additional Professor Not exceeding 58 years as on closing date Associate Professor Not exceeding 50 years as on closing date Assistant Professor Not exceeding 50 years as on closing date

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 14 years after MD/MS; OR 12 years after DM/MCh (2yr/5yr); OR 11 years after DM/MCh (3yr)
10 years after MD/MS; OR 8 years after DM/MCh (2yr/5yr); OR 7 years after DM/MCh (3yr)
6 years after MD/MS; OR 4 years after DM/MCh (2yr/5yr); OR 3 years after DM/MCh (3yr)
3 years after MD/MS; OR 1 year after DM/MCh (2yr/5yr); OR No experience for 3yr/6yr post-MBBS DM/MCh

qualification.details: For Medical Candidates (all posts): | A medical/dental qualification included in Schedule I, II, or Part II of the third schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 Postgraduate qualification: MD / MS / MDS or equivalent in the respective discipline DM (Medical super-specialties) or MCh (Surgical super-specialties) - 2/3/5-year recognized course | For Non-Medical Candidates (applicable to Anatomy, Biochemistry, Physiology, Pharmacology only): | Master's Degree in the discipline/allied subject Doctorate degree from a recognized university in the concerned discipline | Experience - Post-wise: | Note: 1 year experience relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per DoPT rules. | Note: No age relaxation available to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS candidates applying for Unreserved (UR) vacancies.

salary_details.details: *NPA (Non-Practising Allowance) applicable for medically qualified candidates only. After 3 years, Assistant Professors move to Level 13 (Basic ₹1,23,100).

selection_process: Application Scrutiny: All online applications are received and scrutinised by the Selection Committee of AIIMS Rajkot. Only eligible candidates are called for the next stage. Shortlisting: If the vacancy-to-candidate ratio exceeds 1:10
the Selection Committee may shortlist on the basis of an objective screening score (Appendix 1 criteria). Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must produce original academic

and registration certificates before the interview. Personal Interview: Eligible candidates appear before the Standing Selection Committee at AIIMS Rajkot in person. Candidates must make a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation on their work and achievements. Final Selection: The decision of the Competent Authority regarding selection is final and binding.
Note: Interview dates will be communicated via the official AIIMS Rajkot website and email only.

_labels.apply_online: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Apply Online 2026 - Link Active

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 10th July 2026 by 17:00 Hours. The application must be submitted via the Google Form link and the signed copy emailed to [email protected].

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 87 vacancies have been released across four posts - Professor (26), Additional Professor (17), Associate Professor (15), and Assistant Professor (28) — spanning 37 departments. All SC, ST, and OBC vacancies except one are backlog vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General and OBC candidates must pay Rs. 500. EWS candidates also pay Rs. 500. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are fully exempted. Candidates applying on deputation basis are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Selection is through application scrutiny, shortlisting (if applicants exceed 1:10 ratio), document verification, and a personal interview before the Standing Selection Committee at AIIMS Rajkot. Candidates must deliver a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation at the interview.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates currently employed in government service apply?
faq.answer: Yes. Government employees must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of interview. Deputation candidates must route their application through their employer along with ACRs/APARs for the last 5 years and a Vigilance Clearance Certificate.
